tasks.label: Arduino: Build
tasks.command: $start = Get-Date; arduino-cli compile -b arduino:avr:megaADK -j 0 --build-path '${workspaceFolder}/.arduino-build' '${fileDirname}'; Write-Host "ビルド時間: $([math]::Round(((Get-Date) - $start).TotalSeconds, 2))秒"

tasks.label: Arduino: Upload
tasks.command: $port = 'COM6'; if (-not (Get-WmiObject Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { $_.Name -like ('*' + $port + '*') })) { $port = (arduino-cli board list | Select-String 'serial' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] } | Select-Object -First 1) }; if (-not $port) { Write-Error 'ボードが見つかりません。'; exit 1 }; Write-Host "port: $port"; $start = Get-Date; arduino-cli compile -b arduino:avr:megaADK -j 0 -u -p $port --build-path '${workspaceFolder}/.arduino-build' '${fileDirname}'; Write-Host "processing time: $([math]::Round(((Get-Date) - $start).TotalSeconds, 2))s"
